metadata.title:
100000 ASKED
FOR LIFE Of


HUSBAND

STEFFANS CASE AGAINST THE
N. p. ON TRIAL IN THE


SUPERIOR COURT.

pages.raw_text:
Trial of the 100000 damage suit
of Augusta Steffans against the
Northern Pacific Railroad company
was commenced before Judge w. A.
Huneke this morning.


Steffans was run over and killed
by a Northern Pacific passenger
train near Lookout on the Mullan
branch, jumping from passenger
coach when he thought that the
train was running away. He fell
against bank and was thrown
back beneath the wheels of the
train.


The train was going at the rate
of so miles per hour down a 4 per
cent grade at the time Steffans and
two brakeman jumped.


The deceased was Moscow res
taurant keeper. His wife and four
children are joined as plaintiffs in
the action.
